The Venture

A Solid Layout,
Ready to Build On

Siva Sai Estate is a DTCP & RERA approved residential plot venture on the Khammam–Suryapet Old Highway. The layout is demarcated, roads are laid, drainage is underground, and all basic infrastructure is in place.

Located on the quieter outskirts of Khammam with good tree cover and two separate approach roads — a well-planned venture for families building their own home or buyers looking at solid residential land near the city.

"Approved, titled, laid out, and ready — everything a buyer should ask for is already done."

2 Approach Roads
◆
What Is Included

Everything
Already Done

All features below are part of the approved layout — no pending promises, no hidden gaps. What you see on site is what you get.

🏛
DTCP & RERA Approved

All regulatory approvals in place. Documents verifiable before purchase — no paperwork surprises.

🛣
Blacktop Roads

Internal roads are fully black-topped — smooth, all-weather access across the entire layout.

🌿
10% Green & Park Area

10% of the venture is reserved for parks and green space as required by layout norms.

🚰
Underground Drainage

Drainage runs underground — keeps the layout clean and avoids surface drainage problems.

💡
Electricity & Street Lights

Electricity available. Street lights installed on both sides of every internal road.

🌳
Avenue Plantation

Trees planted along all roads — shade, greenery, and a proper neighbourhood feel as they grow.

🚗
Parking Space

Sufficient parking built into the layout design — no cramped access or congestion.

🚪
Grand Entrance Arch

Entrance arch with gates on both sides — already constructed and visible on site.

📜
Clear Land Title

Every plot carries a clear, encumbrance-free title. Verify all documents before you commit.

Location

Where It Sits

01

Khammam–Suryapet Old Highway Road

Directly on the highway — good road quality and easy reach from Khammam city and surrounding areas.

02

Two Separate Approach Roads

Two access roads within 1 km — entry and exit from multiple directions, no single-road bottleneck.

03

Green Belt Location

A naturally greener stretch on the outskirts — quieter and more open than inner-city plots.

04

Near National Greenfield Highway

Just 5 minutes from the Khammam–Suryapet National Greenfield Highway for broader connectivity.

At a Glance
Khammam City Centre 10 min drive
Greenfield National Highway 5 min drive
Nearest Approach Road 1 km
Highway Frontage Direct access
